query: SELECT section, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as filled FROM payment_transactions GROUP BY section;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zL6E4esQEHiYzS.root --database WPSwtnWiTSyEVhTdqqAYk7 --execute SELECT section, COUNT(*) as total, SUM(CASE WHEN period_no IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as filled FROM payment_transactions GROUP BY section;
